zh.Cranbrook, Tunbridge Wells district, Ken: 英國英格蘭肯特可藍別盧可
zh.of Cranbrook, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特可藍別盧可

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gervase Hendley於大約1460年出生在英國英格蘭肯特可藍別盧可時，他的父親Thomas Hendley35歲，母親Joan Shoyswell35歲。他於大約1483年與Elizabeth Roberts在英國英格蘭肯特可藍別盧可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1532年在英國肯特可藍別盧可享年73歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特可藍別盧可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gervase Hendley于大约1460年出生在英国英格兰肯特可藍別盧可时，他的父亲Thomas Hendley35岁，母亲Joan Shoyswell35岁。他于大约1483年与Elizabeth Roberts在英国英格兰肯特可藍別盧可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1532年在英国肯特可藍別盧可享年73岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特可藍別盧可。

nameMeanings.name: Hendley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Hanley or else a variant of Henley with intrusive -d-.

variants.name: Hanley
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Conor, Declan, Donovan, Eamonn, John Patrick.

Irish: shortened form of O'Hanley, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÁinle ‘descendant of Áinle’, a personal name meaning ‘champion’. This is the name of a former ruling family in Connacht and is now common throughout southern Ireland.

English: habitational name from any of the many places called Handley (Cheshire, Derbyshire, Dorset, Northamptonshire) or Hanley (Staffordshire, Worcestershire), named with Old English hēan, the weak dative form (originally used after a preposition and article) of hēah ‘high’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

en.lifeSummary: When Gervase Hendley was born about 1460, in Cranbrook, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Hendley, was 35 and his mother, Joan Shoyswell, was 35. He married Elizabeth Roberts about 1483, in Cranbrook, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1532, in Cranbrook, Kent, England, at the age of 73, and was buried in Cranbrook, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gervase Hendley est né environ 1460, à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Hendley, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Joan Shoyswell, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Roberts environ 1483, à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1532, à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gervase Hendley um 1460 in Cranbrook, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Hendley 35 und seine Mutter Joan Shoyswell 35. Er hat um 1483 in Cranbrook, Kent, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Roberts geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1532 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Cranbrook, Kent, England und wurde in Cranbrook, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gervase Hendley è nato il circa 1460 nel Cranbrook, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Hendley, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Joan Shoyswell, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Roberts circa 1483, nel Cranbrook, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1532, nel Cranbrook, Kent, England, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Cranbrook, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Gervase Hendleyが約1460年にイギリスイギリスケントクランブルークで生まれた時，父Thomas Hendleyは35歳，母Joan Shoyswellは35歳であった。約1483年にイギリスイギリスケントクランブルークでElizabeth Robertsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1532年にイギリスケントクランブルークで73歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントクランブルークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gervase Hendley(이)가 대략 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 크랜브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Hendley(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Shoyswell(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1483년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 크랜브룩에서 Elizabeth Roberts(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1532년 영국 켄트 크랜브룩에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 크랜브룩에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gervase Hendley nasceu aproximadamente 1460, em Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Hendley, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Joan Shoyswell, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Roberts aproximadamente 1483, em Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1532, em Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gervase Hendley родился около 1460 г. в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Hendley было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Shoyswell, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Roberts около 1483 г. в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1532 г. в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gervase Hendley nació aproximadamente 1460, en Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Hendley, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Joan Shoyswell, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Roberts aproximadamente 1483, en Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1532, en Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Cranbrook, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
